title: rubus reflexus
intro: Rubus reflexus, also known as the reflexed bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus reflexus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential antidiabetic properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for use in herbal remedies.
